requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Togo National Conformity, ARSE Authorization, and Project Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——多哥国家合格评定、ARSE授权及项目规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——多哥國家合格評定、ARSE授權及項目規格

summary.en: For PV inverters used in Togo, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core internationally recognised safety standards for power converters and inverter-specific requirements. The public Togo source set reviewed here identifies ARSE authority over renewable-energy production authorizations and technical/safety conformity of electrical installations, but does not identify a public Togo list that automatically approves inverter models by brand. In practice, IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates are the safety evidence expected by national conformity reviewers, CEET/CEB project engineers, IPP project owners, and donor/lender procurement specifications, especially for grid-tied or public-supply solar projects such as utility-scale PV and rural electrification programmes.
summary.zh: 对于在多哥使用的光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率变换器及逆变器特殊要求的核心国际认可安全标准。本次审阅的多哥公开来源确认ARSE对可再生能源发电授权以及电气装置技术/安全合格性具有监管职能，但未发现按品牌自动批准逆变器型号的公开多哥清单。实践中，IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书是国家合格评定审查方、CEET/CEB项目工程师、IPP项目业主以及捐助方/贷款方采购规格通常期望的安全证据，尤其适用于并网或公共供电太阳能项目，如公用事业规模光伏和农村电气化计划。
summary.zht: 對於在多哥使用的光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是功率轉換器及逆變器特殊要求的核心國際認可安全標準。本次審閱的多哥公開來源確認ARSE對可再生能源發電授權以及電氣裝置技術/安全合格性具有監管職能，但未發現按品牌自動批准逆變器型號的公開多哥清單。實踐中，IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書是國家合格評定審查方、CEET/CEB項目工程師、IPP項目業主以及捐助方/貸款方採購規格通常期望的安全證據，尤其適用於併網或公共供電太陽能項目，如公用事業規模光伏和農村電氣化計畫。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Togo Law No. 2018-010 of 8 August 2018 — promotion of electricity production from renewable energy sources
ARSE mandate to certify conformity of electrical installations with applicable technical and safety standards
Project-owner and donor/lender procurement specifications for grid-tied solar PV equipment

summary.en: China-side inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-series requirements, NB/T 32004, domestic type-test reports, and voluntary CQC/CGC certification. These documents may cover safety intent, markings, environmental conditions, and electrical performance under Chinese domestic rules, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates unless the Togo reviewer and project documents expressly accept a clause-by-clause equivalence analysis. For international tenders and lender-backed projects, IEC 62109 certificates from an accredited laboratory are typically expected.
summary.zh: 中国侧逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408系列要求、NB/T 32004、国内型式试验报告和CQC/CGC自愿认证。这些文件可能覆盖中国国内规则下的安全意图、标识、环境条件和电气性能，但除非多哥审查方和项目文件明确接受逐条等效分析，否则不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2证书。对于国际招标和贷款方支持项目，通常期望取得认可实验室出具的IEC 62109证书。
summary.zht: 中國側逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408系列要求、NB/T 32004、國內型式試驗報告和CQC/CGC自願認證。這些文件可能覆蓋中國國內規則下的安全意圖、標識、環境條件和電氣性能，但除非多哥審查方和項目文件明確接受逐條等效分析，否則不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2證書。對於國際招標和貸款方支持項目，通常期望取得認可實驗室出具的IEC 62109證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese GB/T or NB/T safety certificate alone should not be presented as sufficient safety evidence for a Togo PV inverter project. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates for the exact inverter model or model family, document critical components and firmware/hardware variants, and confirm whether the certificate covers the environmental ratings needed for high-temperature, dusty, humid operation in Togo. Where the project is financed by a donor or lender, the procurement specification may require an ILAC-accredited laboratory, specific certificate bodies, or additional factory inspection evidence.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T或NB/T安全证书，不应作为多哥光伏逆变器项目充分安全证据提交。出口商应取得确切逆变器型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书，记录关键部件和固件/硬件变体，并确认该证书是否覆盖多哥高温、粉尘和潮湿运行所需的环境额定值。如项目由捐助方或贷款方融资，采购规格可能要求ILAC认可实验室、特定认证机构或额外工厂检查证据。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T或NB/T安全證書，不應作為多哥光伏逆變器項目充分安全證據提交。出口商應取得確切逆變器型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書，記錄關鍵部件和韌體/硬體變體，並確認該證書是否覆蓋多哥高溫、粉塵和潮濕運行所需的環境額定值。如項目由捐助方或貸款方融資，採購規格可能要求ILAC認可實驗室、特定認證機構或額外工廠檢查證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by national conformity review, ARSE authorization review, CEET/CEB project acceptance, or project-owner/donor/lender procurement specifications; IEC 62109 is the practical safety baseline for grid-tied PV inverter acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme driven in China; Chinese GB/T/NB/T safety evidence is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Togo

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese PV inverter supported only by GB/T or NB/T safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates before Togo shipment or project submission. Confirm model-family coverage, critical component lists, environmental ratings, and any donor/lender certificate-body requirements with the Togo reviewer, CEET/CEB project engineer, and project owner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅具备GB/T或NB/T安全证据的中国光伏逆变器，在出货至多哥或提交项目前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2证书。请与多哥审查方、CEET/CEB项目工程师和项目业主确认型号系列覆盖、关键部件清单、环境额定值以及任何捐助方/贷款方认证机构要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅具備GB/T或NB/T安全證據的中國光伏逆變器，在出貨至多哥或提交項目前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2證書。請與多哥審查方、CEET/CEB項目工程師和項目業主確認型號系列覆蓋、關鍵部件清單、環境額定值以及任何捐助方/貸款方認證機構要求。
